resources.string: I am an 18-year-old tech enthusiast graduating from Francis Joseph Reitz High School with a focus in Computer Science and Software Development. A true "Jack of All Trades" with diverse experience in mobile development, game design, web development, and creative tools. Passionate about building innovative solutions and exploring new technologies. Creative developer who spends free time working on personal projects and collaborating with team members on various creative and technical endeavors. This can stretch anywhere from just art to making whole games and models.

• Android Development (Java)
• Game Development (Unity, Haxeflixel)
• VRChat Content Creation
• 3D Modeling & Animation (Blender, Substance Painter)
• Web Development (HTML/CSS)
• Music Production (FL Studio)
• Digital Art & Design (Ibis Paint)
• Documentation & Technical Writing (MKDocs)
